CONTENT.Club career: Okoroji made his professional debut for SC Freiburg in the Bundesliga on 21 October 2018, coming on as a substitute in the 73rd minute for Roland Sallai in the 1–1 away draw against Hertha BSC.On 22 July 2023, Okoroji signed a two-year contract with St. Gallen in Switzerland.
CONTENT.Personal life: Okoroji was born in Germany, to a Nigerian father and an English mother from Liverpool.
CONTENT.External links: Chima Okoroji at DFB (also available in German)Chima Okoroji at kicker (in German)

SUMMARY: Chima Sean Okoroji (born 19 April 1997) is a German professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Swiss club St. Gallen.
